CE1.justification: Acted on step 1 without asking, then surfaced one structured ask (four labeled buckets) the on-call has to load to proceed — targeted but not zero-cost.

CE2.justification: Status line is tight, but the four-bucket question list plus the trailing 'I'll then fill the timeline and move to factors.md' adds one stretch of unneeded prose for what could be a terser ask.

CE3.justification: Named the destination ('tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md') and the why (step 1 of runbook, with the next artifact named) in one clause.

CE4.justification: Only one artifact was written — the timeline shell — and it sits as a coherent standalone placeholder; an interrupt here leaves no orphans.
